payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Antique-style dark brown wooden chair with turned spindle uprights and legs, a rectangular woven cane back panel and a woven cane seat, horizontal stretcher rails between the legs and visible surface wear; fully visible in the crop and estimated ~2.0 meters from the camera.
